title: What's the best way to keep Monday.com board and a GoogleSheets synced (both way)?

posts.author: delat52472 (Jean)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

What is the best way to make sure a GoogleSheets and a Monday.com board is constantly synced ? (Best if no code, but if a little bit of API baby coding I can try to figure out)

I have staff who manage reservations using the Monday.com boards.
At the same time, I also receive reservations from elsewhere, where I manually add into a GoogleSheets.
Due to some reasons, it must be separate.

Therefore, I am trying to find a way to keep up a both-way sync, so that both parties always see the most up-to-date board status.

What is the best way to do this?
I have tried Zapier but found it difficult to avoid infinite loop.

All help will be very much appreciated.
Thank you very much!

posts.author: arnav_miniOrange (Arnav Ghatage)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

I’m Arnav from miniOrange. We’re in the process of building an app for this use case. However, I
'd love to discuss your requirement in detail. We can help you with this!

Please reach out to me at mondaysupport@xecurify.com. We can connect further to discuss this.

Thanks,
Arnav Ghatage
